title: rhododendron sanguineum subsp. himertum
intro: Rhododendron sanguineum subsp. himertum, a lesser-known subspecies of the alpine rose, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Rhododendron sanguineum subsp. himertum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable remedy for treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron sanguineum subsp. himertum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and other health problems.
